Items.Title: Former Newcastle ace Miguel Almiron becomes first World Cup star sent off for breaking little-known rule against Turkey
Items.Description: MIGUEL ALMIRON has become the first player ever to be sent off for COVERING HIS MOUTH.

Items.Title: 10-man Paraguay knock out Turkey despite Almiron red card
Items.Description: Watch highlights as 10-man Paraguay win despite Miguel Almiron's red card, eliminating Turkey from the 2026 World Cup.

Items.Title: Guler sends apology after Turkey suffer shock elimination from World Cup
Items.Description: In an emotionally-charged encounter in San Francisco, Turkey were sent packing from the World Cup having fallen to back-to-back defeats, losing 1-0 to steely Paraguay after also suffering at the hands of Australia.

Items.Title: Selección Paraguaya
Items.Description:
¡Lo que juega La Joya, señores!

Julio Enciso suma una nueva asistencia en la @FIFAWorldCup 🏆💎

¡A seguir por este camino, crack! 

#VamosParaguay 🇵🇾 https://t.co/RcWGiFZibz

Items.Title: Selección Paraguaya
Items.Description:
¡Entró a la historia grande! 🎖️

Matías Galarza, con récord incluido, fue el gran destacado de la #Albirroja en el encuentro ante Turquía 🇹🇷 

¡Lo que jugaste, Mati querido! 

#VamosParaguay ⚪🔴 https://t.co/VB8tFQvqin
